---
name: Feature Request / 功能建议
about: Suggest an idea for this project / 为项目提出建议
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem? / 该功能请求是否与问题相关？

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...] -->
<!-- 清晰简洁地描述问题是什么。例如：当 [...] 时，我总是很困扰。 -->

## Describe the solution you'd like / 描述你想要的解决方案

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. -->
<!-- 清晰简洁地描述你希望发生的事情。 -->

## Describe alternatives you've considered / 描述你考虑过的替代方案

<!-- A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered. -->

## Use Case / 使用场景

<!-- How would this feature be used in practice? e.g., legal document review, financial audit, etc. -->
<!-- 该功能在实践中如何被使用？例如：法律文档审查、财务审计等。 -->

## Additional context / 补充信息

<!-- Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here. -->
